title: How to Install Approved Software from the Software Catalog
text:
Q: How do I install approved software from the software catalog?
A: Windows: Step 1: Open the Start menu and type 'Software Center' to launch the Software Center application. Step 2: Once open, navigate to the 'Applications' tab to view the list of approved software. Step 3: Browse or search for the software you need, then click on it to see more details. Step 4: Click the 'Install' button to begin the installation process. Step 5: Follow any on-screen prompts to complete the installation. macOS: Step 1: Open the 'Self Service' application from your Applications folder or Launchpad. Step 2: In Self Service, you will see a list of available software; you can browse or use the search bar to find the software you need. Step 3: Click on the software title to view its details. Step 4: Click the 'Install' button to start the installation. Step 5: Wait for the installation to complete, and you may need to enter your Mac user credentials if prompted. Step 6: Once installed, you can find the software in your Applications folder. If you encounter any issues during installation, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
